titleStmt.title: SII 18.437: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 437. (B.K. No. 5 of 1934-35.) BEḶKĒRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1604 (current), Durmati, Phālguna śu. 15, Tuesday, lunar eclipse. The week-day is wrong. The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1682, February 11, which was a Saturday. There was a lunar eclipse on this day.

It records a grant of land made by Lingappa-gauḍa, son of Hanumanta-gauḍa and the grandson of Basavaṇṇa-gauḍa, the Desayi of Gutalal (modern Guttal in Haveri Taluk) to Narahari-Bhatta, son of Bhikaṇa-Bhaṭṭa and the grandson of Giri-Bhaṭṭa. The donee belonged to the Kātyāyana-sūtra, Sukla-yajuś-śākhā and Kauṇḍinya-gōtra and the donor belonged to the same sūtra and śākhā and Mōnabhargava-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
0 . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē traillōkya(ṁ)nagarāra
ṁbhamulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya(ndu) śāllivā
hanaśaka 1604 neya durmmu
ttināmasaṁvatsaradā pallagaṁṇa
śudha 15 maṁgaḷavāra sōmōparāga
parvaṇi puṁṇyakāladallu kātyeyanasū
trada śuklayajuḥśākheya kauṁḍiṇya sa
tugōtrada cakravartti giribhaṭarā maga
bhikaṇabhaṭarā putraru naraharibhaṭarige
kātyeyanasūtrada śuklayajuḥśākheya
mōnabhārgavagōtradā dēśāyi gutaḷalla
basavaṇagauḍara putraru hanumaṁ
tagauḍara tatputrarādā lliṁgapagau
ḍaru barasikoṭa bhūdānapaṭṭekrama
veṁ�ṁdare (9) Adāgi yī puṁṇyakāladalli
māḍidaṁtha (.) bhūdānadiṁda taṁmma Ubha
ya kulada pitrugaḷige Anēkapuṁṇya
llōkaprāpti Āgabēkeṁdu na(ṁ)mma dē
śāyike muṁtāda svastige saluva rā
ṇēdabeṁnūra sīme beḷakerre na(ṁ)mma
śēnabōvike mirāsige salluva mānya
dā beḷavalla maranapaṭiya hollaThere islla.
sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārapūrvvakavāgi kātye
yana sūtradā sukallayajuḥśākheya kauṁḍi
ṇyasagōtrada cakravartti giribhaṭara ttatpu
trarāda bhikaṇabhaṭara makaḷu naraharibhaṭa
rige katyāyanasūtradā (.) śukallayajuḥ
śākheya mōnabhārgavagōtrada dēśā
yi gutaḷalla basavaṇagauḍa
ra putraru hanamaṁtta gauḍa
rā tatputrarādā lliṁgapagau
ḍaru śrīkruṣṇarppaṇavā
māḍikoṭu yidēve yī be
ḷuvalada yarepaṭiholla
staḷadoḷage jallapāṣāṇa
vāgi nidhi nikṣēpa mu
ṁtādaṣṭavidhārjaneya niṁ
mma putrapautraparaṁpārā
Ācaṁdrārkkastayigaḷāgi A
nubhavisikoṁḍu sukhadalliyi
hadu yaṁda śrītuṁgabhadrat[Ī*]ra
dalli kātyāyanasūtrada śukallaya
juḥśākheya kauṁḍiṇyasagōtrada ca
kravartti giribhaṭara makaḷu bhikaṇabha
ṭarā tatputrarāda naraharibhaṭari
ge kātyāyanasūtradā mōnabhārga
vagōtrada dēśāhi gutaḷalla bha
savaṇagauḍara makkaḷu hanuma
ṁtagauḍara tatputraru lliṁgapagauḍaru pravā
cya barasikoṭa bhūdāna koṭaru maṁgaḷa
mahāśrī śrī śrī svadattādviguṇyaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ pa
radattāpahārēṇa svadataṁ vippa
laṁ bhavētu . 1 . Āditya
caṁdrāvaniḷōnaḷaśca dyaurbhū
mirāpō hṛdayaṁ mana
śca 1 . Ahaśca rātriśca U
bhē ca saṁdhyē dharmastu
jānāti narasya vṛttaṁ
. 2 .
Digital edition of SII 18.437 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
